description:

Tag: Pete DiNunzio The Eltingville club

Pinteres...my baby...please...START WORKING AGAIN...I...I need to put the memes...MY BOTS...THEY NEED MEMES...

See look this is what happens when Pinterest doesn't work I get an exstiential crisis and yap abt random stuff cause I can't just put an image of Jerry staring at the camera and asking if you can twerk or calling you gay to avoid actually speaking

Also I'm like 70% sure I just ate foil 😍😍😍
